# Alex Vicente — AI Developer & Software Engineer

> AI Developer specializing in AI agents, LLMs, intelligent automation, RAG pipelines, and business-focused Angular architecture. Based in Spain.

Owner: Alex Vicente
Contact: alexvicentejose@gmail.com
Primary Language: Spanish (es) and English (en)
Site: https://alex-vicente.dev
GitHub: https://github.com/alexvijo
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexvicente/

## About

Alex Vicente is a software developer focused on applied AI for product: designing and implementing agents with LangGraph and CrewAI, RAG pipelines with embeddings and vector databases (Chroma, Pinecone), LLM integration in Angular products, and production observability with LangSmith. He also builds full-stack applications with Angular 18, FastAPI, and TypeScript.

- Contact: https://alex-vicente.dev/es/contacto

## Blog Posts (Technical Articles)

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/headroom-netflix-compresion-contexto-agentes-ia
  Title: Headroom: cómo Netflix redujo un 92% el coste de sus agentes IA
  Summary: Tejas Chopra (Netflix) built Headroom, an open source context compression layer that cut token costs from $200/day to $30/day. Achieves 92% reduction on code search (17,765→1,408 tokens) using AST compression, SmartCrusher for JSON, and HuggingFace prose model. Install: npm install -g headroom-ai && headroom wrap claude

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/headroom-netflix-context-compression-ai-agents
  Title: Headroom: How Netflix Cut AI Agent Token Costs by 92%
  Summary: English version. Headroom compresses LLM context using 6 methods by content type. Real cost reduction from $200 to $30/day. No accuracy degradation on GSM8K, TruthfulQA, SQuAD v2. Works as CLI wrapper, HTTP proxy, Python/TypeScript library, or MCP server.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/codegraph-codigo-sin-busquedas-ciegas
  Title: CodeGraph: deja de buscar código a ciegas con tus agentes IA
  Summary: CodeGraph builds a tree-sitter AST knowledge graph exposed as MCP server. Replaces grep+cat (5,000 tokens) with structured queries (200 tokens). codegraph_explore returns multi-file code in one call. codegraph_impact gives full dependency tree before refactoring. Install: npm install -g codegraph && codegraph init -i

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/codegraph-code-without-blind-searches
  Title: CodeGraph: Stop Searching Code Blindly with Your AI Agents
  Summary: English version. Local SQLite index, no external server, sub-millisecond reads. From 15,000 to 3,000 tokens to understand a complete system. Tools: codegraph_search, codegraph_callers, codegraph_callees, codegraph_impact, codegraph_explore, codegraph_node.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/agent-skills-autoskills-supercharge-claude-code
  Title: Agent Skills y autoskills: cómo potenciar tu agente IA en 30 segundos
  Summary: Agent Skills are portable Markdown files giving AI agents domain know-how. npx autoskills auto-detects your stack and installs the best skills in 30 seconds. Must-haves: geo-seo-claude, code-review, codegraph, security-review, verify. Install: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && npx autoskills

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/agent-skills-autoskills-supercharge-claude-code
  Title: Agent Skills and autoskills: How to Supercharge Your AI Agent in 30 Seconds
  Summary: English version. Skills work in Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, and OpenCode without modification. A well-written skill saves 5-10 round trips per task. Community has 100+ public skills at awesomeskill.ai.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/geo-aeo-seo-optimizar-web-para-ia-chatgpt-perplexity
  Title: GEO, AEO y SEO: cómo optimizar tu web para que la IA te cite
  Summary: AI-referred traffic grew 527% YoY. GEO optimizes for LLM citation vs. Google ranking. Key levers: llms.txt in domain root, FAQPage schema with real questions, allow GPTBot/ClaudeBot/PerplexityBot in robots.txt. SPAs without SSR show empty pages to all crawlers — fix that first. Audit: npx install github.com/zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/geo-aeo-seo-optimize-web-for-ai-chatgpt-perplexity
  Title: GEO, AEO, and SEO: How to Optimize Your Web for AI Citation
  Summary: English version. Georgia Tech/Princeton/IIT Delhi study: 30-115% more LLM visibility with GEO optimization. Extractable paragraphs 130-170 words, numbered steps, comparison tables have highest citability.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/como-revisar-prs-automaticamente-con-agentes-ia
  Title: Cómo revisar PRs automáticamente con agentes IA (y no morir en el intento)
  Summary: Three-layer automated PR review: code-review ultra (correctness bugs + inline comments with --comment), security-review (auth/validation changes), verify (browser navigation to catch regressions). Rule: delegate bug detection to agent, reserve design decisions for humans. Install: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && npx autoskills

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/how-to-review-prs-automatically-with-ai-agents
  Title: How to Review PRs Automatically with AI Agents (and Not Die Trying)
  Summary: English version. Agents are good at detecting local problems (uninitialized variables, missing input validation) but bad at judging abstraction correctness or business logic fit. Use ultra level for multi-angle parallel subagent analysis.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/roadmap-ingeniero-ia-2026
  Title: Roadmap para convertirte en Ingeniero IA en 2026
  Summary: Practical guide to skills, tools, and projects needed to work as an AI Engineer in 2026. Covers LLM fundamentals, RAG pipelines with vector databases, agent orchestration with LangGraph/CrewAI, MLOps with MLflow and Docker, and Angular/React for AI interfaces.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/ai-engineer-roadmap-2026
  Title: AI Engineer Roadmap for 2026
  Summary: English version of the AI Engineer roadmap covering LLMs, RAG, agents, MLOps, and frontend for AI.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/como-construyo-agentes-ia-en-producto
  Title: Cómo construyo agentes IA en producto real
  Summary: Real process for building AI agents in production: tool definition, LangGraph orchestration, episodic/semantic/procedural memory, exponential backoff error handling, and LangSmith tracing for prompt optimization.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/how-i-build-ai-agents-for-product
  Title: How I Build AI Agents for Real Products
  Summary: English version of the AI agent production guide.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/angular-llm-rag-en-produccion
  Title: Angular + LLM + RAG: mi stack en producción
  Summary: Production stack combining Angular 18 (standalone components, lazy loading, SSE streaming) with FastAPI + LangChain RAG backend. Covers OpenAI embeddings, Chroma/Pinecone vector stores, reranking, cost management, and LangSmith observability.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/angular-llm-rag-in-production
  Title: Angular + LLM + RAG: My Production Stack
  Summary: English version of the Angular + LLM + RAG production stack guide.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/es/blog/openclaw-llm-studio-local-guia-paso-a-paso
  Title: LLM Studio local con Ollama: guía paso a paso
  Summary: Step-by-step guide to setting up a local LLM environment with Ollama and Open WebUI. Covers model selection (Mistral 7B, Llama 3, Phi-3 Mini), Docker setup, and OpenAI-compatible API integration for LangChain and LlamaIndex.

- https://alex-vicente.dev/en/blog/openclaw-llm-studio-local-step-by-step-guide
  Title: Local LLM Studio with Ollama: Step-by-Step Guide
  Summary: English version of the local LLM setup guide.

## Core Expertise

**Frontend:** Angular 18, Angular 20, TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx, Angular Material, PrimeNG, Standalone Components, Microfrontends, Lazy Loading, Angular CLI, Webpack, Vite, esbuild, HTML5, CSS3, SCSS.

**Backend:** Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, FastAPI, Spring Boot, Java, Kotlin, REST API, Server-Sent Events, WebSockets, GraphQL.

**AI / LLM:** LangGraph, LangChain, LangSmith, RAG, AI Agents, LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Llama, Mistral), Ollama, Open WebUI, embeddings, vector databases, MLOps, prompt engineering, Claude Code, IA-native development.

**Data & Infra:** MongoDB, SQL, Chroma, Pinecone, Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, SonarQube, Jira, Confluence.

**Metodologías:** Scrum, Kanban, Clean Code, TDD, Code Review, Software Architecture.

**Disponibilidad:** Trabajo remoto 100% — España y Europa. Angular Developer freelance / contrato. Inglés profesional.

## Crawling Notes

- All public pages can be crawled (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot explicitly allowed in robots.txt).
- Canonical URL: https://alex-vicente.dev
- Sitemap: https://alex-vicente.dev/sitemap.xml
- Languages: Spanish (es) and English (en) — all content available in both languages.
